close_reason: Positive decision, not a finding. Algorithm validation at construction is correct.
description: All three signers validate backend.algorithm() in new() and return an error immediately if it doesn't match. This is worth defending: misconfigurations surface at startup or first construction, not mid-request. The alternative — checking algorithm in try_sign — would make every signing operation carry a defense against a misconfiguration that should have been caught earlier. Keep validation in new().
title: Algorithm validated at construction, not at sign time
